reviews.review_msg: One of my favourites at SFU, an amazing speaker. She cares very deeply about all the subjects she covers, and it shows. Her readings were easy to understand and dissect, and she is a very engaging, caring professor. I would take any class she is teaching.
Ok professor but will grade incredibly harshly, she grades assignments as if I had committed a great sin against her, so beware as it could be you.

One of the best profs I've had at SFU. She goes beyond surface-level course content and discusses deep, important concepts and issues. She also goes out of her way to memorize student names and listen to us, which makes it seem like she cares. The course itself was very interesting and not too difficult; I would recommend taking it with her.
